results.title: Bam Adebayo will not face NBA discipline after Tyler Herro skirmish
results.description: Miami Heat All-Star center Bam Adebayo will not face any discipline from the NBA after a physical skirmish with former teammate Tyler Herro, a league spokesman told multiple outlets on Thursday.

results.title: Sarri keen to evolve Atalanta's identity
results.description: Maurizio Sarri intends to marry his own coaching style with Atalanta's philosophy after starting work in Bergamo ahead of his first Serie A season at the helm.
